creator: bsd@bontempi.net
text:
As of today, owncloiud is considerably faster than nextcloud, and possibly the only mature service allowing filesystem storage as-is (vs minIO or similar, as done by eg Seafile)

A possible way to keep owncloud around for FreeBSD users would be to have an additional pkg repository which carries the necessary pho74 packages.

I do not have the skills to setup this, but I can offer robust hosting funded by our non-profit and testing.
